title: Let Me Move ! [BTW Addon]
body:
# Let Me Move ! (BTW:CE Addon)

This addon aims to make minecraft more lively by improving the player's animation (other mobs in the future)

### Animations
- Standing
- Walking
- Crouching
- Sprinting
- Jumping
- Flying
- Floating (in water)
- Busy (while in GUI)
- Climbing ladder
- Falling
- High falling
- Riding
- Hurt
- Eating/drinking

This addon is part of the [Dynamic Visuals Series](https://modrinth.com/collection/Lu0zyquD)

## Beware ! This addon is still in early developement, and is instable in multiplayer

## Dependencies
- https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce
- https://modrinth.com/mod/dranimation-lib

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?
https://github.com/BTW-Community/Dynamic-Visuals-Series/issues

## Download
https://modrinth.com/mod/let-me-move-!/versions
